arts.ttl: Three Bayern Munich players nominated for the EA Sports FC Team of the Year
arts.sum: Bayern’s three nominees are Joshua Kimmich, Jamal Musiala, and Harry Kane. EA Sports FC has named 3 Bayern Munich players in the shortlist of nominees to make their Team of the Year.

arts.ttl: Max Eberl remains tight-lipped on potential new deal for Eric Dier at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: In football, few topics spark as much speculation as contract renewals, but Bayern Munich sporting director Max Eberl prefers to stay focused on the present. For now, Dier’s performances will do the talking, and Bayern fans will hope he continues to deliver when it matters most.

arts.ttl: Preview: Bayern Munich vs. Slovan Bratislava - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's Champions League clash between Bayern Munich and Slovan Bratislava, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Official: Bayern Munich striker talent Jason Eckl moves to SpVgg Unterhaching
arts.sum: Back in December of 2024, Bayern Munich officially announced the partnership struck up between them and SpVgg Unterhaching. #FCBU19 Striker Jason #Eckl will be loaned until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Bundesliga history! Eric Dier’s connection with Harry Kane for Bayern Munich completes first ever “All England” goal in Germany’s top flight
arts.sum: When Eric Dier connected with Harry Kane to set-up the first goal in Bayern Munich ’s 2-1 win over SC Freiburg, it marked Bundesliga history. Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.ttl: Official | Bayern Munich sign German talent Jonas Urbig from FC Köln
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have strengthened their goalkeeping position with the signing of FC Köln and German youth international Jonas Urbig (21) for a reported fee that could exceed €10m. Urbig has…
